scope.target: Restructure specs into a unified .dev/specs tree and align BDD/GWT guides with the new test-spec location
constraints: Keep production specs and test specs under one .dev/specs root
Preserve the conceptual boundary between production behavior specs and test-intent specs
Update workflow-facing guides so the new location becomes discoverable to humans and agents
non_goals: Do not complete every missing test-spec file in one task

inputs.architecture_target: The long-term spec tree should distinguish domains and tests under a single .dev/specs root.
review_findings: A separate .dev/test-specs root cleanly separated semantics but split the spec knowledge tree.
BDD/GWT guides did not yet mention the newly established test-spec workflow.
user_constraints: Update BDD-related guides because this structure was introduced during the current refactor.

steps: Update core spec and BDD/GWT guides to point to the new structure.
validation: BDD/GWT guides explicitly mention .dev/specs/tests/ as the destination for scenario design artifacts.
deferred_items: Broader test-spec coverage for all active use cases.

results.summary: Unified production specs and test specs under .dev/specs, added example test specs, and aligned BDD/GWT guides with the new structure.
